name: Tactician
description: A versatile class that can use swords, tomes, and axes. Their Ignis ability adds half of their Magic or Strength to their damage when triggering skills.

name: Cavalier
description: A mounted unit that uses swords and lances. They have balanced stats and good movement range.

name: Knight
description: A heavily armored unit that uses lances and axes. They have high defense but lower movement.

name: Myrmidon
description: A sword specialist with high skill and speed. They have a natural bonus to critical hit rate.

name: Mercenary
description: A balanced fighting class that uses swords and axes. They have solid stats across the board.

name: Grandmaster
description: The promoted form of Tactician. A master strategist with balanced stats and powerful abilities.

name: Paladin
description: A promoted Cavalier with balanced stats and defensive abilities.

name: Great Knight
description: A heavily armored promoted class that can use swords, lances, and axes. They have excellent defense but lower speed.

name: Swordmaster
description: A master of swordplay with incredibly high skill and speed. They have excellent critical hit rates.

name: Hero
description: A balanced promoted class that uses swords and axes. They have solid stats and the Sol ability for healing.

name: War Monk
description: Promoted healers who can wield axes in combat.

name: Taguel
description: Shape-shifting beasts with high speed and skill.

name: Manakete
description: Ancient dragons with incredible lifespan and defensive stats.

name: Archer
description: Ranged fighters that strike from afar using bows. Vulnerable up close.

name: Pegasus Knight
description: High-mobility flyers with great resistance, but vulnerable to bows.

name: Warrior
description: Incredibly powerful fighters with staggering HP and Strength.

name: Lord
description: A noble leader fighting for their kingdom.

name: Wyvern Rider
description: Heavily armored airborne units with immense physical stats.

name: Cleric
description: Dedicated healers supporting the army from the backlines.

name: Troubadour
description: Mounted healers who offer excellent mobility and support.

name: Villager
description: Inexperienced fighters with extremely high growth potentials.

name: Dancer
description: Performers whose graceful dances allow an ally to move again.

name: Dark Mage
description: Spellcasters who dabble in the forbidden dark arts.

name: Trickster
description: Agile rogues who have picked up healing utility.

name: Thief
description: Nimble units capable of unlocking doors and chests.

name: Fighter
description: Reckless axe wielders boasting incredibly high Health and Strength.

name: Mage
description: Anima magic users striking enemies with elemental tomes.
